title: pandanus ceramicus
intro: Pandanus ceramicus, also known as the screw pine or Pandan, is a tropical plant native to the Pacific Islands and Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Pandanus ceramicus include its ability to lower cholesterol, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of diabetes. The plant can be prepared as tea, tincture, or infused oil, and its leaves are also used in cooking and as a wrapping material for traditional foods.
